_comment: Seed liquidity for the Xphere DEX. Amounts are HUMAN units (script scales by decimals). RATIO = initial price. Only the pairs listed in tokenPairs are seeded on each `npm run seed` run. KDG/XP was already seeded (10 XP : 10000 KDG) — do not re-add it here or it would add MORE liquidity.

tokenPairs._comment: USDX <> XP. Minimal test pool: 1 USDX : 1 XP (caps spend at 1 of each per user instruction). USDX is 6 decimals.
